	random_country = {
		limit = { is_real_country = yes }
		every_in_global_list = {

			pm = venetian_quarter_maintenance

				MnT_epbm_good = { good = paper amount = 0.1 }
			"
		}
		MnT_epbm_register_pm = {
			pm = war_college_requirements
			goods_block = "
				MnT_epbm_good = { good = tools amount = 0.2 }
				MnT_epbm_good = { good = weaponry amount = 0.5 }
				MnT_epbm_good = { good = firearms amount = 0.5 }
				MnT_epbm_good = { good = fine_cloth amount = 1.0 }
				MnT_epbm_good = { good = books amount = 1.0 }
				MnT_epbm_good = { good = paper amount = 2.0 }
				MnT_epbm_good = { good = cannons amount = 0.25 }
			"
		}
		MnT_epbm_register_pm = {
			pm = warehouse_maintenance
			goods_block = "
				MnT_epbm_good = { good = lumber amount = 0.1 }
				MnT_epbm_good = { good = tools amount = 0.1 }
				MnT_epbm_good = { good = salt amount = 0.1 }
			"
		}
		MnT_epbm_register_pm = {
			pm = warrior_monks_training_grounds_maintenance
			goods_block = "
				MnT_epbm_good = { good = cloth amount = 0.01 }
				MnT_epbm_good = { good = paper amount = 0.05 }
				MnT_epbm_good = { good = weaponry amount = 0.05 }
			"
		}
		MnT_epbm_register_pm = {
			pm = wharf_maintenance
			goods_block = "
				MnT_epbm_good = { good = tar amount = 0.1 }
				MnT_epbm_good = { good = naval_supplies amount = 0.05 }
				MnT_epbm_good = { good = tools amount = 0.1 }
				MnT_epbm_good = { good = lumber amount = 0.1 }
			"
		}
		MnT_epbm_register_pm = {
			pm = windmill_maintenance
			goods_block = "
				MnT_epbm_good = { good = tools amount = 0.025 }
				MnT_epbm_good = { good = lumber amount = 0.05 }
				MnT_epbm_good = { good = cloth amount = 0.05 }
			"
		}
		MnT_epbm_register_pm = {
			pm = wissel_bank_maintenance
			goods_block = "
				MnT_epbm_good = { good = paper amount = 0.5 }
				MnT_epbm_good = { good = goods_gold amount = 0.5 }
				MnT_epbm_good = { good = silver amount = 0.5 }
			"
		}
		MnT_epbm_register_pm = {
			pm = zhixian_maintenance
			goods_block = "
				MnT_epbm_good = { good = paper amount = 0.25 }
				MnT_epbm_good = { good = weaponry amount = 0.1 }
				MnT_epbm_good = { good = tools amount = 0.05 }
				MnT_epbm_good = { good = fine_cloth amount = 0.05 }
			"
		}
	}

	# Estate-assigned buildings: charge full cost to the named estate
	add_to_global_variable_map = { name = MnT_epbm_estate_map key = building_type:bulgarian_administration_center value = estate_type:peasants_estate }
	add_to_global_variable_map = { name = MnT_epbm_estate_map key = building_type:cinque_port value = estate_type:burghers_estate }
	add_to_global_variable_map = { name = MnT_epbm_estate_map key = building_type:corporation_of_london value = estate_type:burghers_estate }
	add_to_global_variable_map = { name = MnT_epbm_estate_map key = building_type:gallowglass_sept value = estate_type:tribes_estate }
	add_to_global_variable_map = { name = MnT_epbm_estate_map key = building_type:local_schools value = estate_type:peasants_estate }
	add_to_global_variable_map = { name = MnT_epbm_estate_map key = building_type:maniot_toll_guards value = estate_type:peasants_estate }
	add_to_global_variable_map = { name = MnT_epbm_estate_map key = building_type:nobility_fortifications value = estate_type:nobles_estate }
	add_to_global_variable_map = { name = MnT_epbm_estate_map key = building_type:nobles_recruitment_center value = estate_type:nobles_estate }
	add_to_global_variable_map = { name = MnT_epbm_estate_map key = building_type:warrior_monks_training_grounds value = estate_type:clergy_estate }
}
